title: Custom issue

---
name: Task
about: Track a specific lab task
title: "[TASK] "
labels: task
assignees: andynilson
---

## Description
Briefly describe what needs to be done.

## Related Requirement
Which part of the lab this satisfies (e.g., "CSS selectors", "Flexbox", "Standup.md").

## Tasks
- [ ] Subtask 1
- [ ] Subtask 2
- [ ] Subtask 3

## Files Affected
List files you expect to modify (e.g., index.html, style.css).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Requirement is fully implemented
- [ ] Code is clean and readable
- [ ] Changes are tested in browser
- [ ] Ready to be merged via PR

## Notes
Optional extra context or ideas.
